title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hitachi India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hitachi India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Hitachi India South Asia Partners in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hitachi India South Asia Partners:
Hitachi India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India South Asia Partners!
